name: Country Breakfast (Kraft)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes, green bell pepper, and onion in the margarine until they are lightly browned.
2. Season the mixture to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Break the eggs over the potato mixture and cover it. Cook until the eggs are done.
4. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese over the eggs and cover again. Heat until the cheese melts.
